creator: tom@eborcom.com
text:
I have fixed up the chimera2 port so it compiles if png and jpeg are
installed, but not under /usr/local. I have also upgraded the port
from version 2a11 to 2a15, added some more MASTER_SITES and moved
the manual page from pkg/PLIST to MANx in the Makefile.

Files added:
scripts/configure

Files removed:
patches/patch-ab
patches/patch-ac
